name: Boss Holdings, Inc.
summary: Boss Holdings, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, imports, markets, and distributes pet supplies and cell phone accessories worldwide. The company also provides custom imprinting of inflatable and other products for advertising specialties industry. It offers its products through direct online marketing to professional groomers, boarders, and veterinarians, as well as through wholesale distribution, retailers, convenience stores, and travel centers. Boss Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1893 and is based in Kewanee, Illinois.
